gitHubOrg.description: GitHub organization or user that owns the repos

repos.description: Repositories to onboard. Each entry is either a plain name (empty repo, no template) or an object selecting a starter template.

oneOf.description: Repository name (empty repo). Derives rg-<name> and sp-<name>-github.

template.description: Starter template the repo is scaffolded from (GitHub template repository)

auth.description: container-app only: enable Entra built-in auth (Easy Auth). Default true.

preview.description: Create a per-branch preview environment: an isolated rg-<name>-preview + sp-<name>-preview-github (Owner of that RG only, federated to any branch) so non-main branches can deploy to a sandbox, never to prod. Default false.
